scripts.build:staging: npm run compile-templates && cdk synth --context environment=staging
scripts.build:prod: npm run compile-templates && cdk synth --context environment=production
scripts.deploy: npm run compile-templates && cdk deploy --context environment=production
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run compile-templates && cdk deploy --context environment=staging
scripts.diff: npm run compile-templates && cdk diff --context environment=staging
scripts.diff:prod: npm run compile-templates && cdk diff --context environment=production
scripts.test:prod: npm run compile-templates && TEST_URL=https://jessehattabaugh.com playwright test
